zh.Thetford, Norfolk, England: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可特福德
zh.Middleham, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾米德勒哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Bigod於大約1180年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可特福德時，她的父親Roger Bigod 3rd Earl of Norfolk and Suffolk37歲，母親Ida de Tosny Countess of Norfolk20歲。她和Ranulph FitzRobert至少有2個兒子。她去世於1252年享年73歲。

zh-hans.Thetford, Norfolk, England: 英国英格兰諾福爾可特福德
zh-hans.Middleham, Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰越可爾米德勒哈姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Bigod于大约1180年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可特福德时，她的父亲Roger Bigod 3rd Earl of Norfolk and Suffolk37岁，母亲Ida de Tosny Countess of Norfolk20岁。她和Ranulph FitzRobert至少有2个儿子。她去世于1252年享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bigod
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Jaroslaw, Jozef, Krystyna, Slawomir.

Polish and Jewish (from Poland): from bigos, formerlydenoting anything that was chopped or slashed, now a particular dishcomposed of hash and sauerkraut; also ‘confusion’; hence perhaps anickname for someone who caused confusion.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moira
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Máire , now used throughout the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Bigod was born about 1180, in Thetford, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Roger Bigod 3rd Earl of Norfolk and Suffolk, was 37 and her mother, Ida de Tosny Countess of Norfolk, was 20. She had at least 2 sons with Ranulph FitzRobert. She died in 1252, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Bigod est née environ 1180, à Thetford, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger Bigod 3rd Earl of Norfolk and Suffolk, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Ida de Tosny Countess of Norfolk, avait 20 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils avec Ranulph FitzRobert. Elle est décédée en 1252, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Bigod um 1180 in Thetford, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger Bigod 3rd Earl of Norfolk and Suffolk 37 und ihre Mutter Ida de Tosny Countess of Norfolk 20. Sie hatte mit Ranulph FitzRobert mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1252 im Alter von 73 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Bigod è nata il circa 1180 nel Thetford, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Roger Bigod 3rd Earl of Norfolk and Suffolk, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Ida de Tosny Countess of Norfolk, aveva 20 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli con Ranulph FitzRobert. Morì nel 1252, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Bigodが約1180年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクスエトフォードで生まれた時，父Roger Bigod 3rd Earl of Norfolk and Suffolkは37歳，母Ida de Tosny Countess of Norfolkは20歳であった。彼女はRanulph FitzRobertとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1252年に73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Bigod(이)가 대략 1180년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 테트퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger Bigod 3rd Earl of Norfolk and Suffolk(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ida de Tosny Countess of Norfolk(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 Ranulph FitzRobert(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1252년 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Middleham, Yorkshire, England: Middleham, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Bigod nasceu aproximadamente 1180, em Thetford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Roger Bigod 3rd Earl of Norfolk and Suffolk, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Ida de Tosny Countess of Norfolk, tinha 20 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Ranulph FitzRobert. Ela faleceu em 1252, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Bigod родилась около 1180 г. в местности тетфорд, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Roger Bigod 3rd Earl of Norfolk and Suffolk было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Ida de Tosny Countess of Norfolk, 20. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына от Ranulph FitzRobert. Она умерла в 1252 г. в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Bigod nació aproximadamente 1180, en Thetford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Roger Bigod 3rd Earl of Norfolk and Suffolk, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Ida de Tosny Countess of Norfolk, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Ranulph FitzRobert. Murió en 1252, a la edad de 73 años.
